message:
feat(collab): refactor WebSocket subscription to use central hub

Rewrites useGraphSubscription to use the unified WebSocket hub at /ws
instead of the deprecated /ws/collaboration endpoint:

Connection flow changes:
- Connect to /ws instead of /ws/collaboration
- Subscribe to workspace-scoped channels:
  - workspace:reservations:{workspaceId} for file lock events
  - workspace:conflicts:{workspaceId} for collision detection
- Connected state only set true after "subscribed" ack received
- Handles WS_SUBSCRIPTION_DENIED and INVALID_CHANNEL error codes

Message translation layer:
- Parses hub message format: { type: "message", message: { type, payload } }
- Maps hub event types to GraphEvent format:
  - reservation.acquired → ReservationNode with patterns, expiry
  - reservation.released → ID for removal
  - conflict.detected → ConflictEdge with involved agents
  - conflict.resolved → ID for removal
  - agent.status → AgentNode state update

New workspaceId option (defaults to "default") allows components to
subscribe to specific workspace collaboration state.

Adds comprehensive unit tests with MockWebSocket to verify:
- Correct subscription channel format
- Connection state lifecycle
- Event type mapping

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
